entry.title: 36::260 - SFO to DIA
entry.summary:
WarzauWynn posted a photo:

Beginning a 48 hour trip to CO, September 2014, to attend a wedding.
entry.content:
WarzauWynn posted a photo:

Beginning a 48 hour trip to CO, September 2014, to attend a wedding.

entry.title: 36::93 - No fun allowed
entry.summary: WarzauWynn posted a photo:
entry.content: WarzauWynn posted a photo:

entry.summary:
WarzauWynn posted a photo:

News crews report on a high school surfer who rescued two out of three people who were drowning at Ocean Beach. The third was not found.
entry.content:
WarzauWynn posted a photo:

News crews report on a high school surfer who rescued two out of three people who were drowning at Ocean Beach. The third was not found.

entry.title: 36::68 - Garmin Edge 305
entry.summary:
WarzauWynn posted a photo:

My trusty biking GPS. This thing is years old and the battery still holds a great charge. The biggest downside is that smartphones are so much better at geolocation now that this is hardly worth using anymore.
entry.content:
WarzauWynn posted a photo:

My trusty biking GPS. This thing is years old and the battery still holds a great charge. The biggest downside is that smartphones are so much better at geolocation now that this is hardly worth using anymore.

entry.summary: WarzauWynn posted a photo:
entry.content: WarzauWynn posted a photo:

entry.summary: WarzauWynn posted a photo:
entry.content: WarzauWynn posted a photo:

entry.summary: WarzauWynn posted a photo:
entry.content: WarzauWynn posted a photo:

entry.summary: WarzauWynn posted a photo:
entry.content: WarzauWynn posted a photo:

entry.title: 36::63 - First bike commute of 2014
entry.summary:
WarzauWynn posted a photo:

I got out my trusty steed and rode it to work this morning. It's still going strong for a 9 year old that's never been tuned up before.
entry.content:
WarzauWynn posted a photo:

I got out my trusty steed and rode it to work this morning. It's still going strong for a 9 year old that's never been tuned up before.

entry.summary: WarzauWynn posted a photo:
entry.content: WarzauWynn posted a photo:

entry.title: 36::7 - Photo code
entry.summary:
WarzauWynn posted a photo:

Speaking of photo processing workflow, here's the only photo I took on Jan 16th: a snip of some of the code that pre-processes my photos when I plug in my cameras or phone or whatever various other photo devices to my computer. This helps me merge …
entry.content:
WarzauWynn posted a photo:

Speaking of photo processing workflow, here's the only photo I took on Jan 16th: a snip of some of the code that pre-processes my photos when I plug in my cameras or phone or whatever various other photo devices to my computer. This helps me merge photos from all of my various cameras and devices into Lightroom in a way where I can verify uniqueness in the case of disaster recovery or when duplicates somehow creep in. Regarding duplicates, I use ZFS with deduplication on the backup side of things so even if duplicates interfere with my photo workflow, they don't take up much more room on my disks.

entry.summary: WarzauWynn posted a photo:

uZnpPD

entry.summary:
WarzauWynn posted a photo:

Starting another 365 project and digging into photos that are nearly two months old has renewed my happiness that I took the time to learn to code. Organizing photos would take an unsurmountable amount of time if I hadn't automated so much of my workflow. I …
entry.content:
WarzauWynn posted a photo:

Starting another 365 project and digging into photos that are nearly two months old has renewed my happiness that I took the time to learn to code. Organizing photos would take an unsurmountable amount of time if I hadn't automated so much of my workflow. I highly recommend that everybody who does not know how to make computers do things for them take the time to learn how to do so. Even knowing just a little bit about programming goes a long way. Check out Code Academy if you are looking for a free, easy intro into making your computer work for you so you can get back to working on things you love, like taking photos.

entry.title: 36::1 - Welcome to my 5th 365
entry.summary:
WarzauWynn posted a photo:

I'm nearly two months behind in my posting, and things are a little jumbled, but hey, I at least I took the photos.
entry.content:
WarzauWynn posted a photo:

I'm nearly two months behind in my posting, and things are a little jumbled, but hey, I at least I took the photos.

entry.title: 36::34 - Tien races
entry.summary:
WarzauWynn posted a photo:

One of the first shots with my new Sony A7 + Kipon Tilt NIK-NEX + 55mm ƒ/1.2 S.C. The A7 fixes pretty much all of my gripes from the NEX series software interface.
entry.content:
WarzauWynn posted a photo:

One of the first shots with my new Sony A7 + Kipon Tilt NIK-NEX + 55mm ƒ/1.2 S.C. The A7 fixes pretty much all of my gripes from the NEX series software interface.
